title: Vorxii's Modpack
description: A very simple and optimized modpack that still adds to the vanilla minecraft experience, without changing or adding any mechanics.
body:
> **_This modpack contains all of the resource packs that I use, as well as the mods that I use._**
> 
> **- This modpack mainly focuses on optimization, while still improving the vanilla minecraft experience.**
> 
> **_→ Can be used for casual multiplayer, pvp, and casual single-player worlds, or pretty much anything else, honestly._**
>
>  **_This modpack was made by @vorxii_**
> 
> ![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/815237217f0112d52c9db4c52cdd24e580ebed08.png)
> 
> **LINKS ↓**
> 
>  **_Vorxii's Youtube_** - **https://www.youtube.com/@vorxii**
>
>  **_Vorxii's Discord Invite_** - **https://discord.gg/G5HCbEzdYX**
>
> **_I hope you enjoy the pack!_**
